/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fsanitize=address "CMakeFiles/harp-probe.dir/host/harp-probe.c.o" "CMakeFiles/harp-probe.dir/host/client.c.o" "CMakeFiles/harp-probe.dir/host/usb_io.c.o" -o harp-probe   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libusb/1.0.29/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libusb/1.0.29/lib libharpcore.a -lm -lusb-1.0
